features.name: Design foundation and global chrome
features.description: Brand tokens, type system, header with mobile menu, footer, CTA bands, ownership band, process strip, marquee, scroll reveals
acceptance: Tokens match the brand sheet (ink 2D2A2B, paper E6E6E4, blue 346AEA, lime CDDD3C)
Fonts are Space Grotesk, Hanken Grotesk, Space Mono
Reveals degrade gracefully without JS and under prefers-reduced-motion
Mobile menu closes on navigation and Escape

features.name: Home page
features.description: Hero, marquee, triangulation block, services list, ownership band, process strip, credibility strip, closing CTA
acceptance: Outline section 3.1 copy used verbatim
Triangulation panel three is visually emphasized
All five service rows link to detail pages

features.name: Service detail system
features.description: One template, five content files, prev/next navigation, per-service OG images
acceptance: All five routes statically generated from one template
Outline sections 3.3a-e used verbatim for problem, build, get, engagement
Practice walkthroughs are anonymized, conservative, and labeled representative
Activepieces is never named anywhere

features.name: Services hub
features.description: Header, architecture story with HTML diagram, five service summary blocks, closing CTA
acceptance: Diagram shows the data foundation, three modules, and the platform chassis
Rows read title, problem statement, description, duration, link

features.name: Ownership manifesto
features.description: Dark hero, four-passage argument, practical FAQ, closing CTA
acceptance: Build it. You own it. at display scale
Outline passages verbatim
FAQ uses native details/summary, keyboard accessible

features.name: Approach page
features.description: Four engagement stages in depth, what-we-are-not section, closing CTA
acceptance: Stage bodies verbatim from outline section 3.5
Each stage shows what you walk away with and how long it takes

features.name: About page
features.description: Firm story, four principles, typographic founder block, closing CTA
acceptance: Outline section 3.6 copy verbatim
No stock photos or fake imagery, typographic founder panel until a real photo lands

features.name: Contact page and form API
features.description: Headline, expectation block, optional scheduler embed, validated form, spam-protected route handler
acceptance: POST /api/contact validates, honeypots, and time-traps (verified by request tests)
Email delivery via Resend env vars, graceful no-op without them
Control characters stripped, name and company forced single-line
Form is client-validated with accessible error wiring

features.name: Insights system
features.description: Markdown pipeline, index page, article template, three launch essays
acceptance: Posts render from content/insights with computed reading time
Three essays at 650-900 words obeying every copy rule
Adding a markdown file is the only publishing step

features.name: SEO and sharing infrastructure
features.description: sitemap.xml, robots.txt, branded OG images for every route, branded 404, security headers
acceptance: All routes in the sitemap including posts
OG images render the mark, eyebrow, and title on ink at 1200x630
Unique colon-free titles and descriptions on every page

features.name: Copy rules compliance
features.description: Binding rules from the outline enforced across all rendered copy
acceptance: No em-dashes, semicolons, or colons in rendered copy
Banned vocabulary absent (grep-verified)
Build it, you own it present on every page via footer or section
No pricing anywhere

features.name: Accessibility floor
acceptance: Informational text meets WCAG AA contrast (computed and swept)
Visible focus states, skip link, semantic landmarks, aria-labelledby sections
prefers-reduced-motion disables marquee and reveals
